sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix Ascend NPU CP attention for batch size > 1
sglang.author: AndyLi429
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#23269 generalized attention context-parallel (CP) prefill from bs == 1 to bs > 1 by reshaping ContextParallelMetadata from single scalars into per-sequence lists/tensors. That change updated the CUDA FlashAttention path and the DSA indexer, but missed the Ascend NPU FIA CP path in do_cp_

sglang.title: [NPU] DFlash Speculative Decoding Support NPU
sglang.author: gjsheu

Motivation
Given that dFlash has been merged, this PR adapts the changes for NPU based on the following draft: #18343.
Accuracy Tests
We have conducted a new round of testing using the latest code.
About settings, we follow #16818 except hardware.

hardware: Ascend910
target_model: Qwen/Qwen3-8B
dra

sglang.title: [bugfix]: size CuteDSL MoE allgather buffers for the worst-case forward
sglang.author: Jiminator
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
--moe-runner-backend flashinfer_cutedsl on the standard (non-A2A) allgather path crashes at serving time:
ValueError: num_tokens (4073) exceeds max_num_tokens (2048)

Regression from #22669: ensure_cutedsl_wrapper sizes the CuteDslMoEWrapper CUDA-graph buffers from the first forward's tok

sglang.title: ci: allow /rerun-test to dispatch nightly/weekly CUDA tests
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
/rerun-test <file> only accepts tests registered with the new-style register_cuda_ci(stage=..., runner_config=...) API. Legacy nightly/weekly suites register with a single-string suite="nightly-..." and carry no runner_config, so the handler rejects them:
⛔ test_ring_2_5_1t.py: No register_c

sglang.title: [CI] ci-coverage-overview: schedule + manual only, include XPU/MUSA/multimodal_gen
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Three related fixes to the daily CI coverage overview workflow.
(This replaces #26613, which was opened from a personal fork. Same commits.)
1. Trigger frequency
ci-coverage-overview.yml currently triggers on every PR that touches .github/workflows/ci-coverage-overview.yml, scripts/ci/utils/ci_cover

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Optimize metadata allocation and transfer for mooncake intraNode NVLink
sglang.author: TTThanos
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As #26394 @ShangmingCai  fix the metadata divergence before all-reduce across different ranks, we can revert metadata buff allocation device from 'cpu' to 'cuda' and do not transfer it via TCP.
Modifications

In Class MetadataBuffers, we allocate metadata buffer on GPU memory
Use IntraNod

sglang.title: Fix MoE LoRA wrapper exposing moe_runner_config
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix a MoE LoRA crash introduced after #25379.
#25379  added direct access to self.mlp.experts.moe_runner_config.inplace in the DeepSeek/Kimi MoE forward path. When MoE LoRA is enabled, self.mlp.experts is wrapped by FusedMoEWithLoRA, which did not expose moe_runner_config, causing an Attr

sglang.title: [MoE Refactor] Migrate SM90 Cutlass W4A16 to MoeRunner
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#24816 landed the SM90 cutlass MXFP4 path as a private _apply_sm90_cutlass helper that bypassed the unified MoeRunner, with create_moe_runner falling through to pass for flashinfer_mxfp4. #25525 then introduced the register_fused_func((a2a, runner_backend)) pool and migrated flashinfer_cu

sglang.title: [DeepSeek-V4] Add mhc_fused_post_pre kernel
sglang.author: JoeLee314
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
[DeepSeek-V4] Add fused mHC post/pre kernel
Motivation
This PR optimizes the DeepSeek-V4 mHC path by fusing the boundary between one mHC post step and the next mHC pre step.
The approach is adapted from TRTLLM. The main idea is to avoid launching separate kernels for the latency-sensitive decode pat

sglang.title: [MLX] Support Qwen3.5 (dense) Model
sglang.author: yeahdongcn
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Qwen3.5 hybrid models do not follow the older uniform self_attn decoder-layer layout. The MLX backend failed to start Qwen3.5 models because attention discovery assumed the first decoder layer was a standard softmax-attention layer, while Qwen3.5 can start with a linear-attention layer.

sglang.title: [parallel] Support moe_dense_tp_size == attn_tp_size to share the attention TP group
sglang.author: brucechanglongxu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Today SGLang restricts moe_dense_tp_size to {1, None} and rejects the configuration where the dense MLP is tensor-parallelized along the attention TP group, i.e. moe_dense_tp_size == attn_tp_size > 1. Three guards block this specific case:

ServerArgs.check_server_args asserts moe_dense_t

sglang.title: [NPU] fix model llava-onevision-qwen2-7b-ov torch compiles error in npu case
sglang.author: ZeyuanChen2000
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When the model lmms-lab/llava-onevision-qwen2-7b-ov is launched in the NPU case, a graph execution error caused by @torch.compile occurring in funtion apply_scaling_penalties.

Modifications
If disable=is_npu() is used, torch.compile is completely disabled when the NPU platform is detecte

sglang.title: feat: add SGLANG_RAY_BUNDLE_INDICES for fine-grained Ray bundle index control
sglang.author: KaisennHu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add placement_group parameter and SGLANG_RAY_BUNDLE_INDICES environment variable to enable precise, per-worker control over Ray placement group bundle index assignment. Similar to vLLM's VLLM_RAY_BUNDLE_INDICES. Enables:

Skipping unhealthy GPUs (select alternative bundles)
Topology-aware

sglang.title: [Scheduler] Defer prefill input_ids H2D to forward stream, unify resolve via future_map
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Defer prefill input_ids H2D from schedule_stream to forward_stream, and unify input_ids materialization across overlap and non-overlap: input_ids is left None during scheduling and resolved at forward entry through the always-on FutureMap relay.

Mechanism

prepare_for_extend stages prefill

sglang.title: 【NPU】【bugfix】fix server error when mtp unquant
sglang.author: cen121212
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
On NPU , the main model and draft model sometimes adapt different quantization schemes.With the ongoing refactoring of DeepEP, the environment variables for MTP quantization are currently affecting the main model incorrectly.
Modifications
python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/token_dispatcher/dee

sglang.title: Optimize large add_constant tensors
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add an architecture-aware vectorized path for large add_constant tensors: 16-byte vectors on pre-Blackwell / AMD, and 32-byte vectors on Blackwell when supported by the CUDA toolchain.
Keep the scalar kernel for small tensors and for inputs/outputs that are not aligned to the selected vecto

sglang.title: [config] Recognize custom hybrid SWA models via hf_text_config.is_hybrid_swa
sglang.author: brucechanglongxu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Allow custom architectures to opt into the hybrid SWA memory path without being added to the hard-coded allowlist.

is_hybrid_swa_model now also accepts the model's hf_text_config and returns True when getattr(hf_text_config, "is_hybrid_swa", False) is set.
ModelConfig._derive_hybrid_model threads h

sglang.title: [core] Compute dimensions/return_pooled_hidden_states in ForwardBatch.init_new
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: These two ScheduleBatch fields are computed in prepare_for_extend and read only by ForwardBatch (no scheduler / filter / merge / SB-internal reader). Move the computation into ForwardBatch.init_new (over the same batch.model_config / batch.reqs) and drop the SB fields. Behavior-preserving; per-req R

sglang.title: Make qwen3's set_embed_and_head idempotent
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Guard the weight deletions in Qwen3ForCausalLM.set_embed_and_head with
hasattr checks so the method is idempotent: calling it when
embed_tokens.weight / lm_head.weight have already been deleted (e.g. a
second invocation, or after a prior tie/share step) no longer raises
AttributeError.


CI States
L

sglang.title: Apply gemma's position offset out-of-place instead of in-place
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Gate the positions increment in Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration behind a
new SGLANG_GEMMA_OUT_OF_PLACE_POSITION_MUTATION env flag. When enabled, the
forward pass uses an out-of-place positions = positions + 1 instead of the
default in-place positions += 1, avoiding mutation of a shared positions
tens

sglang.title: Fix the EAGLE chunked-prefill next-token chain (#26329)
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
When EAGLE speculative decoding runs with chunked prefill, the draft input
rotation must use the next prompt token (not the verified next token) at the
tail of a non-final chunk, otherwise the draft chain diverges from the target.
Tracks the next prompt token of the chunked request on ScheduleBatch

sglang.title: Add a nullcontext placeholder in the forward path for KV-canary
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Prep refactor (suggested by liangsheng): insert the with canary_ctx:
scaffolding into the model-execution and EAGLE speculative forward paths
with canary_ctx set to contextlib.nullcontext(), so the follow-up
KV-canary wiring PRs are small, readable diffs (swap the placeholder for
the real context) i

sglang.title: Add a debug toggle for selectively reverting PR fixes
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce a pr_fix_toggle debug utility
(python/sglang/srt/debug_utils/pr_fix_toggle.py) whose maybe_revert_pr_fix
entrypoint, gated by the new SGLANG_DEBUG_REVERT_PR env flag, can revert a
selected PR fix at runtime via the source patcher for A/B debugging. The
Scheduler.__init__ calls maybe_revert

sglang.title: Add a SimplePhaseChecker for execution-phase assertions
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce a SimplePhaseChecker debug utility in
python/sglang/srt/utils/phase_checker.py: a Triton-kernel-based assertion
helper that verifies an execution phase counter matches an expected value at
runtime, printing a diagnostic and firing a device assert on mismatch. Output
is gated by the new SGL

sglang.title: Pull test_utils server-launch boilerplate into reusable helpers
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Extract the subprocess-spawning logic shared by the test server launchers
into a single _subprocess_popen_with_outputs helper, which either runs the
process with inherited stdout/stderr or, when return_stdout_stderr is given,
pipes the streams and tees them to the provided sinks via background threa

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary verify JIT kernel and reference implementation
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Also brings the shared kernel base this kernel depends on (folded in here
as it has no standalone use): jit_kernel/kv_canary/{init,consts}.py and the
csrc/kv_canary/{consts,canary_common}.cuh CUDA headers, plus the kernel-agnostic
test scaffolding (fuzz driver, hand oracle, const-sync test).


CI St

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary write JIT kernel and reference implementation
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add the KV-canary write JIT CUDA kernel: write.py (WritePlan and
launch_canary_write_kernel) and its paired header csrc/kv_canary/canary_write.cuh,
plus the Python reference write_ref.py. The write kernel stamps canary slots into
the KV cache; it builds on shared types from the verify kernel and the

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary plan JIT kernels
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add the plan KV-canary JIT CUDA kernel, the top consumer of the write/verify
kernels.
The plan op (python/sglang/jit_kernel/kv_canary/plan/: api.py, entries_kernel.py,
offsets_kernel.py, utils.py) computes per-request canary write/verify plans and
launches the canary_plan_entries.cuh kernel; it cons

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary core: data layer, MHA KV-pool patcher, and per-forward runner
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Combine the config / state / buffer-group data layer, the KV-pool patcher with
the MHA adapter, and the per-forward CanaryManager / SingleForwardManager runners
plus verification endpoint into one self-contained canary core. SWA and
DeepSeek-V4 pool support, and the e2e baselines that exercise the w

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary install API and forward-path wiring
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce the public entry point of the kv-canary runtime and wire it into
the model-execution forward path.

api.py: install_canary(server_args, model_runner) builds the CanaryConfig
from env, attaches canary buffers to the KV pool, computes launch
capacities and constructs the CanaryManager; retur

sglang.title: Add KV-canary SWA + DeepSeek-V4 pool support
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Layer sliding-window-attention (SWA) and DeepSeek-V4 KV-pool support onto the
MHA-only canary core: the SWAKVPool / DeepSeekV4TokenToKVPool pool attachers and
their adapters, the swa / dsv4 e2e test modes and pool server-arg presets, and
the SWA + DeepSeek-V4 baseline e2e tests. The shared FULL/SWA

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary mock-model end-to-end test harness
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add the mock-model end-to-end test harness that the KV-canary self-tests build
on: a tiny mock model plus the shared perturb-e2e base and utilities, and the
generic tp/pp/pd e2e smoke tests. Per-feature e2e tests (perturb, token-oracle,
EAGLE) live with their own feature commits and depend on this h

sglang.title: Add a periodic full-radix-tree KV-canary sweep
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce a periodic full-radix-tree re-verification mode for the KV
canary. Every N forward steps the canary walks all radix-tree-held KV
slots and verifies them, in addition to the per-forward HEAD/TAIL
verify. This catches silent corruption of cached KV that a given
forward step never touches.
Ga

sglang.title: Support EAGLE speculative decoding in the KV-canary
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Wire kv-canary into the EAGLE speculative-decoding draft/verify forward
paths so the canary write/verify runs during draft steps, in addition to
the existing non-EAGLE model-runner integration.
EAGLE issues multiple single-forward draft steps per outer step, so this
adds per-step single-forward-mana

sglang.title: Add rids/bootstrap-room int-hash plumbing for deterministic per-request identification
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Add the per-request identification plumbing the deterministic token oracle builds on: hash each request id / bootstrap room into an int64 tensor (rids_int / bootstrap_room_ids_int on ForwardBatch + SamplingBatchInfo, via _hash_rids_to_tensor / _bootstrap_rooms_to_tensor) and carry them through cuda-

sglang.title: Add a deterministic token oracle and production write-input assertion
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce the token-oracle feature together with the production
write-input assertion that consumes it: a deterministic "token_oracle"
sampling backend whose per-request sampled next tokens are known ahead
of time, letting kv-canary's write-input assertion validate that the
model consumed exactly th

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary perturb framework for fault-injection self-tests
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce the kv-canary perturb framework: a self-test subsystem that
deliberately corrupts KV state at controlled points so the canary
verification paths can prove they actually catch corruption.


CI States
Latest PR Test (Base): 🚫 Run #26700513229
Latest PR Test (Extra): ❌ Run #26700513189

sglang.title: Add real-data KV verification to the KV-canary
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add the real-data KV verification capability on top of the naive
(synthetic-only) canary: alongside the synthetic chain hash, hash the model's
REAL KV bytes into canary slot field[3] and verify them, so corruption of the
actual cached K/V is caught (not just the synthetic stamps).

jit_kernel: RealK

sglang.title: Add token-id verification to the KV-canary
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Add the optional verify-token-id capability: cross-check each canary slot's stored input token id against an independently-computed expected token (req_all_ids -> scatter_req_token_ids kernel -> plan.verify_expected_tokens), catching the model placing the wrong token's KV in a slot. Gated by SGLANG_

sglang.title: Add the KV-canary perturb modes and PD-disaggregation e2e tests
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add the canary self-test perturb modes plus the prefill-decode disaggregation
e2e coverage, all on top of the perturb framework:

req_to_token perturb mode (gated by SGLANG_KV_CANARY_PERTURB_REQ_TO_TOKEN_PROB).
real_kv perturb modes: real_kv_used, real_kv_unused_cache, real_kv_post_forward
(each gat

sglang.title: Add a sliding-window-attention divergence reporter for the KV-canary
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add an opt-in observability reporter for sliding-window-attention (SWA)
pools that tracks, per forward, how the SWA verify counts diverge from
the FULL pool and how many slots the SWA allocator has remapped, then
emits a parseable "kv_canary_swa_divergence=" log line every N steps.

python/sglang/sr

sglang.title: Add periodic KV-canary stats logging and kernel-run-counter health check
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add two always-on KV-canary observability add-ons, both pure observers
of CanaryDeviceState counters and the sweep orchestrator (nothing
depends on their output):


Periodic stats logging
(python/sglang/srt/kv_canary/runner/stats_logger.py): a
PeriodicCanaryStatsLogger that prints, every N forward s

sglang.title: Fix routed-experts device buffer overflow under DP attention
sglang.author: brucechanglongxu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The routed experts device buffer in RoutedExpertsCapturer can overflow when DP attention is enabled and max_running_requests is larger than chunked_prefill_size * dp_size. The buffer's first dim is currently max(chunked_prefill_size * dp_size, max_running_requests). On non-DeepEP DP-attention paths
